/usr/bin/c++  -g -Wall -pthread -hiredis -g CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/ConnectPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/MysqlDB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/chatserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/chatservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/mysql.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/redis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/user.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/src/server/usermodel.cpp.o -o ../bin/chat_server   -L/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lpthread -lhiredis
